name: Awakening Beneath the Waves
summary: The characters awaken in Tidewarden recruit bodies, survive their first day at the academy, meet Squad 9, complete training exercises, and receive their first routine assignment: patrol the Silvered Market.
objectives: Awaken in the Barracks of Tides
Search belongings and notice the body swap
rewards: Good Luck Shell from Nella if treated kindly
dmNotes: This session should make Atlantis feel safe, alive, and worth protecting. The market patrol is intentionally mundane so Nella and the civilians matter later.

name: The Missing Child
summary: Nella Tidehopper disappears. The recruits investigate the Silvered Market, follow clues into hidden areas, discover Nella's fate, and witness Atlantis begin blaming the Surface Realm.
objectives: Receive the memory fragment: They'll blame the surface
dmNotes: No XP reward. Use milestone leveling. This session is about grief, suspicion, and the first public narrative turning against the Surface Realm.

name: Shadows Beneath Atlantis
summary: The recruits leave Atlantis for their first assignment beyond the city walls and investigate the Trench Beacon. The mission becomes an ambush, proving someone inside Atlantis leaked the route.
objectives: Discover the attackers knew the route
rewards: Black coral / suspicious evidence if used
Milestone: advance to level 6 after the session
dmNotes: This is the first mission beyond Atlantis and the first clear proof that not every enemy comes from outside the city.

name: Family Day
summary: Families arrive at the academy. The recruits interact with loved ones from the lives they inherited and uncover personal contradictions in the original recruit identities.
objectives: Notice contradictions in the original recruits' lives
Receive the memory fragment: We were never supposed to survive the transfer
dmNotes: This is a roleplay-heavy session. The point is to make the body swap personal.

name: Final Examination
summary: The recruits believe they are completing a graduation test, but the mission leads to a hidden Atlantean facility connected to Nella, the beacon ambush, Project Tidefall, and experimental Deepborn research.
objectives: Hear Thalorin reveal this was recruitment, not graduation
Recover the damaged Project Tidefall document
rewards: Evidence: Authorized by Order of the Crown
dmNotes: No level-up yet unless pacing requires it. This is the final truth-before-graduation session.

name: Graduation of the Tidewardens
summary: Graduation day begins with celebration, banners, families, and the Festival of the First Tide. Then Atlantis is attacked by the Abyssal Maw, forcing the recruits to defend the city before becoming full Tidewardens.
objectives: Experience Festival of the First Tide atmosphere
Respond to Commander Vaeloria's deployment order
Defend Atlantis from the Abyssal Maw
Discover the Spiral Message: Meet me beneath the city
dmNotes: This is the Act I finale. The recruits do not simply graduate; they earn it by defending Atlantis during the Abyssal Maw attack.
